response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in academic or minor roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Experience with distributed systems and Kubernetes deployment
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable leadership of cloud compute platforms or distributed infrastructure at scale
Lacks documented experience in cloud architecture or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
